previousDayImpact: Team Godfather gained a single point from Canada's victory, extending their lead at the top of the standings.
leaderboardSummary: Team Godfather remains in first place with 98 points after picking up a point from Canada.
The rest of the leaderboard remains static as no other entries saw point changes since the previous update.
leverageWatch: The matchup between Morocco and Netherlands is a major focal point, as eight different entries have selected the Netherlands.
Team Pahl has a unique opportunity to gain ground with their pick of Brazil against Japan, while other top entries like Team Choo Choo and Team Jordan are invested in Japan.
Brent's Daddy and Bijan Mustard are looking for separation in the Paraguay versus Germany match, as they each hold one of the two teams.
